markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on client transitions and new internal processes.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Client Handoffs:** Kelvin’s contract non-renewal requires smooth handoffs for Otto, Relay, and Logic. The goal is to make the transition seamless for clients, despite recent CM churn on these accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [**HX PSEO Strategy:** The PSEO strategy is being scoped internally this sprint (2 weeks). Bailey will hold off on pushing for client feedback until a refined set of 2–3 viable options is ready for presentation.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [**Logic Production Pause:** Logic requested a production pause for a strategy shift. To mitigate SOW risk, Bailey will propose creating evergreen, high-funnel content or new artifacts in the interim.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [**New Internal Processes:** Bailey will gain visibility into the new Account Health Review process and Linear board this week. The Relay new project lead will be handed off to the sales team (Tyler, Cece, Kyle) via an internal Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)

## Topics

### Client Handoffs & Transitions

  - [**Context:** Kelvin's contract non-renewal requires handoffs for Otto, Relay, and Logic.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [**Goal:** Ensure a seamless client experience despite recent CM churn on these accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [**Tiro:** Handoff is complete; Rachel is already managing the account.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)

### HX: PSEO Strategy & Content

  - [**Content:** Bailey will send comparison and tool article topics today for client approval.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
      - [**Action:** Rachel will write the first 1–2 articles as a calibration test to get quick, detailed feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [**PSEO Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [**Status:** Scoping internally with Kyle this sprint (2 weeks).](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The team needs to define viability and appetite for the strategy before presenting options to the client.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
      - [**Decision:** Bailey will not push for client feedback this week.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
      - [**Client Comms:** Bailey will inform the client (David) that the team is "scoping internally" and will present refined recommendations soon.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

### Logic: Production Pause

  - [**Context:** Logic requested a production pause during a strategy shift to avoid creating unaligned content.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [**Risk:** Pausing production may breach the SOW's 5 articles/week commitment.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [**Proposed Solutions:**](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
      - [Create evergreen, high-funnel content (e.g., glossary terms) that is strategy-agnostic.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
      - [Generate new artifacts (e.g., personas, messaging) for the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
  - [**Action:** Bailey will consult Andy on the SOW risk and propose a solution to the client.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)

### Otto: Reporting & Transition Comms

  - [**Reporting:** Jakub will lead the reporting deep dive next week to ramp up Bailey's analytics skills.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
  - [**Transition Comms:** Bailey will consult Andy on whether to formally announce the internal transition to the client.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The client-facing experience is unchanged, and an announcement might create unnecessary concern.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Relay: New Project & Content

  - [**New Project Lead:** The lead will be handed off to the sales team.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [**Action:** Bailey will post a summary of client needs and resources in the internal channel, tagging Tyler, Cece, and Kyle.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [**Content:** New keyword research will begin this week, based on the client's messaging docs for an "accounting persona."](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)

### New Internal Processes

  - [**Account Health Review:** Bailey will gain visibility into the new Linear board this week.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [**Purpose:** The board tracks ad-hoc actions to improve account health metrics, with tickets generated from the Monday review call.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [**Reporting Structure:** Bailey now reports to Andy.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The weekly sync with Jakub will continue for now, leveraging his deep client context. The cadence may be reduced over time.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
      - [Send HX article topics to the client.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
      - [Consult Andy on Logic's production pause and SOW risk.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
      - [Consult Andy on announcing the internal transition to Otto.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [Post Relay new project summary and resources in the internal channel, tagging Tyler, Cece, and Kyle.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [Begin Relay keyword research based on new messaging docs.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
  - [**Jakub:**](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
      - [Lead the Otto reporting deep dive next week.](https://fathom.video/share/GT1nynXv_6o2EC1NQSspd5vixh3hzewy?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
